title: Gaming groups urge Congress to ban prediction markets sports betting in CLARITY Act
summary: Gambling industry groups want the US Senate to step in to clarify that the Commodity Futures Trading Commission does not have the authority to oversee prediction markets.

title: Crypto-backed GOP candidate wins Alabama Senate runoff with June primaries looming
summary: Several more US states are scheduled to hold primaries next week after one Republican candidate won in Alabama on Tuesday after a crypto company-backed PAC used what it called its “biggest spend of the cycle.”

title: SpaceX Surge Could Be Worth Billions for FTX—Will Creditors Benefit?
summary: Defunct crypto exchange FTX gained exposure to SpaceX in 2022, and the rocket-maker’s post-IPO rally has lifted hopes among creditors.

title: Nvidia Built Robots That Train Themselves Using AI Coding Agents
summary: Nvidia's ENPIRE hands an entire robot fleet to coding agents like Codex and Claude Code, letting them write training code, test it on real hardware, and improve without a human watching.
